overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting two characters sitting on a snow-covered ledge overlooking a medieval town square. The static camera captures various NPCs traversing the plaza while historic stone buildings stand in the background under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy medieval town square viewed from elevated ledge

agents.ego_description: two characters sitting on a stone ledge overlooking the town square, remaining mostly still while occasionally shifting slightly

notable_agents.action: figure in yellow robe standing still near the stone urn, facing the plaza
pedestrian in dark clothing walking from right to left behind the seated characters

entered.detail: open town square covered in snow with visible footprints and paths
cluster of historic stone structures with snow-covered rooftops forming the town skyline
large ornate stone planter or urn positioned at the edge of the plaza
low wooden fence separating the ledge from the plaza below
large stone archway or gate structure in the distant center of the town

segments.scene_description: A static view from behind two seated characters overlooking a snowy medieval plaza. The scene features historic stone architecture in the background, a decorative urn to the left, and various NPCs walking through the square. A pedestrian in dark clothing passes behind the main characters from right to left, while a figure in yellow stands motionless near the urn.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, contemplative perspective from a high vantage point overlooking a bustling medieval plaza blanketed in snow. It begins behind two seated characters, framing a wide view of historic stone architecture and a decorative urn under an overcast winter sky. As the camera holds its position, the stillness of the foreground contrasts with the movement in the square, where a pedestrian in dark clothing drifts from right to left. The scene remains focused on this quiet observation, capturing a motionless figure in yellow near the urn while other NPCs traverse the snowy expanse below.
